name: dnd-random-tables
description: dnd-random-tables. Pre-built rollable content tables. Offloads improvised content generation from the LLM — NPC names, city rumors, road encounters, dungeon dressing, weather events, merchant wares, and minor plot hooks. Call a table instead of inventing on the fly.
author: Leona (Zeebie), with the help of Remmi for debugging
